mapper.sql: room_no, room_name, location, capacity, status, created_at
rr.reservation_no, rr.room_no, r.room_name, r.location, rr.user_no, rr.reservation_date, rr.start_time, rr.end_time, rr.status, rr.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room ORDER BY room_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (room_name, location, capacity, status) VALUES (#{roomName}, #{location}, #{capacity}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'AVAILABLE'))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room_reservation rr JOIN room r ON rr.room_no = r.room_no WHERE rr.room_no = #{roomNo} ORDER BY rr.reservation_date DESC, rr.start_time DESC
SELECT FROM room_reservation rr JOIN room r ON rr.room_no = r.room_no WHERE rr.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY rr.reservation_date DESC, rr.start_time DESC
SELECT FROM room_reservation rr JOIN room r ON rr.room_no = r.room_no ORDER BY rr.reservation_date DESC, rr.start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_reservation (room_no, user_no, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{userNo}, #{reservationDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'RESERVED'))
mapper.update: UPDATE room_reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE reservation_no = #{reservationNo} AND status = 'RESERVED'
UPDATE room_reservation SET status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE status = 'RESERVED' AND ( reservation_date < CURRENT_DATE OR (reservation_date = CURRENT_DATE AND end_time < CURRENT_TIME) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_reservation WHERE reservation_date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'RESERVED'
